name: Copper Coins
description: The most basic form of currency. Common as dirt.

name: Bronze Coins
description: Worth their weight in bronze. A step up.

name: Silver Coins
description: Shiny and valuable. The mark of a tradesman.

name: Platinum Coins
description: Beyond gold. Only the wealthiest possess these.

name: Wood
description: Freshly cut timber. Useful for building things.

name: Stone
description: Rough stone hewn from the earth. A fundamental material.

name: Planks
description: Smooth wooden planks, ready for construction or sale.

name: Cut Stone
description: Precisely shaped stone blocks, far more useful than raw stone.

name: Bricks
description: Sturdy fired bricks — premium construction material.

name: Furniture
description: Quality furniture crafted from processed wood. Sells well.
